papers.title: RAIE: Region-Aware Incremental Preference Editing with LoRA for LLM-based Recommendation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted as the backbone of recommender systems. However, user-item interactions in real-world scenarios are non-stationary, making preference drift over time inevitable.
